permissions.name: android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.label: 读取存储
permissions.description: 读取设备上的照片、媒体和文件.
permissions.description_en: Reads photos, media, and files stored on the device.

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.label: 写入存储
permissions.description: 向设备共享存储写入或修改文件.
permissions.description_en: Writes or modifies files in shared device storage.

permissions.name: android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO
permissions.label: 麦克风
permissions.description: 通过设备麦克风录制音频.
permissions.description_en: Records audio through the device microphone.

permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.label: 精确位置
permissions.description: 访问 GPS 等来源提供的精确位置信息.
permissions.description_en: Accesses precise location from GPS and related sources.

permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
permissions.label: 大致位置
permissions.description: 访问基于网络的大致位置信息.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_CONTACTS
permissions.label: 读取联系人
permissions.description: 读取设备通讯录中的联系人信息.
permissions.description_en: Reads contact information from the device address book.

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE
permissions.label: 电话状态
permissions.description: 读取电话状态、移动网络和设备标识相关信息.
permissions.description_en: Reads phone state, mobile network, and device identity information.

permissions.name: android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT
permissions.label: 连接附近设备
permissions.description: 连接并与已配对的蓝牙设备通信.
permissions.description_en: Connects to and communicates with paired Bluetooth devices.

permissions.name: android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
permissions.label: 通知
permissions.description_en: Shows app notifications to the user.
